title: Garlic Noodles
description: Simple yet delicious garlic noodles with butter, oyster sauce, and a touch of parmesan. Quick weeknight favorite!
instructions: Boil pasta in a skillet with a little water until al dente
In a wok, melt butter on medium-low heat
Start sautéing garlic 6 minutes before pasta is ready
Add oyster sauce, soy sauce, and fish sauce to the garlic
Transfer cooked noodles to the wok with some pasta water
Increase heat to high and stir everything together
Add more pasta water if needed - aim for slightly wet consistency
tips: Don't burn the garlic - keep heat medium-low
Save pasta water to adjust sauce consistency
The sauce should be slightly wet, not dry
Fresh garlic makes a big difference in flavor
